name: SITI - B&T Group S.p.A.
summary: SITI - B&T Group S.p.A. engages in the production of plants for the tile manufacturing industry worldwide. The company also provides digital decorating machines and digital graphic design projects; plants for sanitary ware; and finishing systems for ceramic materials. In addition, it offers technical assistance for the installation, maintenance, and modernization of production lines. The company was founded in 1961 and is based in Formigine, Italy.
